# zstack_aliyun_nas_access_group (Resource)

Manage Aliyun NAS access group



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `data_center_uuid` (String) UUID of the data center
- `name` (String) Name of the access group

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the access group
- `network_type` (String) Network type of the access group

### Read-Only

- `type` (String) Type of the access group
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the Aliyun NAS access group
